C

calculateContributions(IsolationForest, double[], List<DataRecord>) - Method in class app.service.impl.anomalies.BaseDataRecordAnomaliesDetectionService
Computes the algorithmic feature contribution percentage breakdown explaining how heavily each independent variable influenced a specific anomaly score.
calculateContributions(IsolationForest, double[], List<FinancialIndicators>) - Method in class app.service.impl.anomalies.BaseFinancialIndicatorsAnomaliesDetectionService
Computes the algorithmic feature contribution percentage breakdown explaining how heavily each independent variable influenced a specific anomaly score.
calculateContributions(IsolationForest, double[], List<T>) - Method in class app.service.impl.anomalies.BaseAnomaliesDetectionService
Computes the algorithmic feature contribution percentage breakdown explaining how heavily each independent variable influenced a specific anomaly score.
calculateMeans(List<DataRecord>) - Method in class app.service.impl.anomalies.BaseDataRecordAnomaliesDetectionService
Computes the mathematical mean values across all financial data dimensions from a collection of data records to form a centralized operational reference point.
calculateMeans(List<FinancialIndicators>) - Method in class app.service.impl.anomalies.BaseFinancialIndicatorsAnomaliesDetectionService
Computes the mathematical mean values across all financial data dimensions from a collection of data records to form a centralized operational reference point.
calculateMeans(List<T>) - Method in class app.service.impl.anomalies.BaseAnomaliesDetectionService
Computes the mathematical mean values across all financial data dimensions from a collection of data records to form a centralized operational reference point.
calculateRSInMACDnATRnCMF(FinancialIndicatorsPeriods) - Method in class app.controller.Controller
Calculates a suite of complex financial technical indicators (RSI, MACD, ATR, and CMF) using the specified intervals, updating the global application state with the results.
calculateRSInMACDnATRnCMF(FinancialIndicatorsPeriods) - Method in class app.service.impl.indicators.IndicatorsServiceImpl
Simultaneously computes RSI, MACD, ATR, and CMF technical indicators.
calculateRSInMACDnATRnCMF(FinancialIndicatorsPeriods) - Method in interface app.service.IndicatorsService
Simultaneously computes RSI, MACD, ATR, and CMF technical indicators.
calculateRSInMACDnATRnCMF(List<DataRecord>) - Method in class app.service.impl.indicators.IndicatorsServiceImpl
Overloaded calculation route designed to compute technical indicators using an explicitly supplied list of data records and the fallback baseline FinancialIndicatorsPeriods.STANDARD_PERIODS.
CardPanel - Class in app.gui.components
A customized JPanel designed to mimic a modern visual card component.
CardPanel() - Constructor for class app.gui.components.CardPanel
Constructs a CardPanel initialized with a GridBagLayout and an enabled drop shadow.
CardPanel(LayoutManager) - Constructor for class app.gui.components.CardPanel
Constructs a CardPanel with a specified layout manager and an enabled drop shadow.
CardPanel(LayoutManager, boolean) - Constructor for class app.gui.components.CardPanel
Constructs a CardPanel with a specified layout manager and optional drop shadow.
CHART_ANOMALY - Static variable in class app.gui.style.AppColors
The highlight color channel used for anomaly thresholds.
CHART_LINE1 - Static variable in class app.gui.style.AppColors
The default primary series color for multi-line time-series line charts.
CHART_LINE2 - Static variable in class app.gui.style.AppColors
The secondary alternative data series color.
CHART_SCORE - Static variable in class app.gui.style.AppColors
The default primary series color for bar charts.
chartContainer - Variable in class app.gui.views.AbstractChartsPanel
The dynamic graphical container responsible for arranging and rendering the chart plots.
CmfCalculator(int) - Constructor for class app.service.impl.indicators.IndicatorsServiceImpl.CmfCalculator
Prepares structural buffer memory rings sized precisely to periodic requirements.
CMFPeriod - Variable in class app.dto.FinancialIndicatorsPeriods
The period interval configuration for CMF (Chaikin Money Flow) calculations.
Controller - Class in app.controller
The main controller of the application, acting as the orchestrator between the user interface layer, the application state, and the background services (data fetching, indicator calculation, and anomaly detection).
createCharts() - Method in class app.gui.views.MainPage
Commands the downstream navigation dashboard tab elements to plot charts following dataset queries.
createCharts() - Method in class app.gui.views.MenuPanel
Reveals the menu structure, orders the initial generation of charts on the historical results panel, and sets the visual focus on the first tab.
createCharts() - Method in class app.gui.views.ResultsChartsPanel
Extracts historical market data from the application state, builds the respective stylized line charts, and injects them into the graphical container for visual rendering.
CsvStorageService - Class in app.util
Service utility layer responsible for handling persistent disk input/output operations.
CsvStorageService() - Constructor for class app.util.CsvStorageService
